name: Thyroid Incidentaloma
description: Report template for incidental thyroid nodules identified on imaging performed for other indications

findings.technique: CT [neck/chest/CTA] performed for [other clinical indication]. Axial images reviewed through thyroid bed.
findings.comparison: No prior neck imaging available for comparison.
findings.limitations: Limited assessment due to non-dedicated neck CT protocol. Ultrasound correlation recommended.

sections.name: Thyroid Nodule
sections.content: Incidental thyroid nodule identified in [right/left] [lobe/isthmus]. Size: [X]cm. Location: [upper/mid/lower] pole. Density: [X]HU (pre-contrast). Enhancement: [mild/moderate/marked].

sections.name: Nodule Characteristics
sections.content: Margin: [well-defined / irregular / lobulated]. Calcifications: [present/absent] - [macrocalcifications / punctate]. Cystic change: [present/absent].

sections.name: Additional Findings
sections.content: Additional nodules: [present/absent]. If present: [number], largest: [X]cm. [Lymphadenopathy: present/absent]. [Tracheal deviation: present/absent].

sections.name: Thyroid Gland
sections.content: Overall thyroid size: [enlarged/normal/atrophic]. Parenchyma: [homogeneous/heterogeneous]. [Diffuse abnormalities: present/absent].

impression:
1. Incidental thyroid nodule in [right/left] lobe measuring [X]cm
2. ACR TI-RADS [X]: [category] - follow-up recommendations per guidelines
3. [Ultrasound correlation / Biopsy] recommended based on nodule characteristics and size threshold
4. Clinical correlation and endocrinology consultation recommended
author: RadReport Templates
